name: context-palace
description: Spatial context routing for Codex coding tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex through a structured project knowledge palace.
interface.longDescription: Context Palace builds a spatial index for repositories and lets Codex retrieve only the needed floors, rooms, drawers, files, and symbols before coding.
defaultPrompt: Use Context Palace to index this repository.
Use Context Palace before implementing this task.
Use Context Palace to find a minimal route.
